description: hello-cards cache rules (PRD D3/M3b). PUT against zones/$CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID/rulesets/phases/http_request_cache_settings/entrypoint. Expressions are mutually exclusive so rule order never matters.

rules.description: (a) SSE endpoints (/api/events, /ds/events): bypass cache so events stream through the edge unbuffered
(b) /api/*: bypass cache (defense in depth over origin Cache-Control, F4)
(c) everything else: respect origin Cache-Control (year-long immutable /assets/*; no-cache index.html revalidates at the edge)
